prompt: Create a warm, dreamy product-style illustration of a cozy floral character café in soft golden afternoon light. The scene is set on a wooden café table beside a large open window with pale curtains, a flower garland, and blooming pink cherry blossoms outside. In the foreground, show exactly four branded café items arranged left to right: 1) a cream paper shopping bag with rope handles, printed with a delicate oval wreath illustration of a long-haired girl in a white dress standing on a green meadow with a small white rabbit, plus the text 「花風の夢」 and “CAFÉ”; 2) a tall beige takeaway coffee cup with a white lid, decorated with the same long-haired girl, two rabbits, tiny meadow flowers, leafy arches, and a small golden sun circle near the top; 3) a small upright acrylic menu card in a wooden base, framed by tiny floral vines, titled “MENU,” listing exactly five items with prices: 「春の花ラテ」 650, 「桜のミルクティー」 620, 「夢見ごこちソーダ」 680, 「花冠クッキー」 320, 「抹茶フロート」 700; 4) a small square wooden tray holding one illustrated café card and exactly two sweets: a pink flower-shaped cookie and a green leaf-shaped cookie. The background should include wooden shelves with jars, bottles, framed café posters, and several soft-focus flower arrangements, all in a beige, cream, sage green, blush pink, and honey-gold palette. The central mascot is a gentle long-haired girl with light brown golden hair, wearing a simple white dress. Use the café name 花風の夢 CAFÉ on the shopping bag. Keep the style whimsical, polished, and highly detailed, like a premium illustrated character café merchandise mockup, with shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, fine floral line art, and no extra text beyond the specified labels and menu items.
